title: [PyCDE] Module names sometimes have '_' in odd places
body:
e.g.:

```
@module
class ComplexPorts:
```

```
hw.module @pycde.Comple_Ports(%data_in: !hw.array<3xi32>, %sel: i2, %struct_data_in: !hw.struct<foo: i32>) -> (%a: i32, %b: i32, %c: i32)
```

Should be `@pycde.ComplexPorts`! Happens deterministically (repeated runs of the same script) though I haven't noticed a pattern.
